testsuite.name: execute_contact.ContactTest

testcase.name: createContactTest
testcase.system-out: Selected salutation dropdown option successfully Entered First Name: shubham_ Entered Last Name: jaiswal Switched to window with title: Administrator - Contacts - vtiger CRM 5 - Commercial Open Source CRM Switched to window with title: Context successfully shifted to Child Window Returned back to Parent Window context Validating actual First Name [shubham_] against expected [shubham_] Validating actual Last Name [jaiswal] against expected [jaiswal]

testsuite.system-out: Selected salutation dropdown option successfully Entered First Name: shubham_ Entered Last Name: jaiswal Switched to window with title: Administrator - Contacts - vtiger CRM 5 - Commercial Open Source CRM Switched to window with title: Context successfully shifted to Child Window Returned back to Parent Window context Validating actual First Name [shubham_] against expected [shubham_] Validating actual Last Name [jaiswal] against expected [jaiswal]
